changelog: v16: Guided Focus manager. One-shot `lifehug.py focus-new` scaffolds a new question-bank category, registers the Focus, and auto-generates+promotes ~8-12 starter questions (graceful scaffold-only fallback when no AI is available). New `/focus` Claude Code skill and OpenClaw message protocol walk through add/show/finish/tune. Adds category scaffolding (roadmap.scaffold_category) and bulk candidate promotion (candidates promote-neighborhood). Includes v15.1: OpenClaw-first AI routing in research_expand (keyless generation when OpenClaw is running; Anthropic SDK fallback). v15: Focus model + dynamic Focus-weighted allocation + self-knowledge/relational neighborhoods + wiki relationships/self surfaces + progress dashboard + three-tier scheduling. | v16.1: Answer quality loop — implicit richness scoring accumulates per answer; weekly profile aggregation feeds multipliers into planner weights and AI expansion prompts; zero friction
